summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Carrier Profile Builder wizard frontend functionality. Successfully tested wizard access, form fields, navigation, localStorage persistence, and UI components. Found one critical modal stability issue that affects user experience.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal stability issue - wizard closes unexpectedly during interactions
ui_bugs.symptoms: Wizard modal closes without user action, requiring manual reopening through Company dropdown
reproduction_steps: 1. Open Carrier Profile Wizard from Company dropdown
2. Fill out form fields in Step 1
4. Need to reopen via dropdown to continue

passed_tests: ✅ Carrier Profile Wizard opens from Company dropdown menu
✅ Step 1 - All Company Info form fields work correctly (legal name, DBA, company type, country, province, phone, email, website)
✅ Logo upload zone is present and accessible
✅ Step navigation sidebar shows correct status indicators (complete/current/upcoming)
✅ Progress bar displays correctly in header
✅ Country selection properly affects province dropdown options (Canada/US/Both)
✅ Company type dropdown works with all options (Trucking Company, Owner-Operator, Both)
✅ Initials avatar updates dynamically based on company name input
✅ localStorage persistence works - data saves and restores properly
✅ Wizard resumes from saved progress when reopened
✅ Form validation and required field indicators present
✅ Brand colors correctly implemented (deep navy #0A1628 and electric cyan #00D4FF)
✅ All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
✅ Navigation between steps works (Step 1 to Step 2 confirmed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal stability issue in CarrierProfileWizard component. The wizard modal closes unexpectedly during user interactions, likely due to overlay click handlers or JavaScript errors. This affects the user experience and prevents smooth completion of the wizard workflow.
